title: Big Bundles
description: A vanilla friendly containers addition that is perfect for your Minecraft world
body:
# BIG BUNDLES
### The Big Bundle is here to carry your adventures further!
### This mod introduces a brand-new storage item — The Big Bundle — designed for players who want more space without breaking the balance of Minecraft’s progression.

## Features

- 16 Dyed Variants – craft your bundle in any color you like, with full support for recoloring using dyes.

- ⚒️ Smart Slot System – each Big Bundle has 4 slots:

- Slot 1 & 4: reserved for tools and totems.

- Slot 2 & 3: can hold any items (but no shulker boxes and no big bundles, to prevent infinite nesting).

- 🎨 Custom Crafting Recipe – simple to make, easy to dye, and supports recoloring with any Minecraft dye.

- Dynamic Models – Big Bundles visually change between open and closed states depending on whether they hold items.

**The Big Bundle is powerful, but not overpowered:**

- ❌ No hopper automation – you can’t fill Big Bundles automatically, keeping them fair compared to shulker boxes.

- ⛔ No shulker nesting – no sneaky ways to make mega shulkers

## 🚀 Why Big Bundle?

**If you’ve ever wanted something between a regular Bundle and a Shulker Box, this is your answer. Perfect for explorers, builders, and adventurers who want a balanced upgrade to early- and mid-game storage.**

[Donate me if you like 🥀🙏](https://paypal.me/AmeenSharabati)
